definition: A series of games where winners advance until one champion remains.
example: The chess tournament lasted all weekend.

definition: A natural helper in cells that speeds chemical reactions.
example: Saliva contains enzymes that begin digestion.

definition: Software used to visit websites on the internet.
example: She cleared cookies in her browser settings.

definition: To soak food in a flavored liquid before cooking.
example: Let the tofu marinate for one hour.
